findings.title: Highly duplicated JSON schema parsing in tests
findings.summary: The schema-contracts.test.ts file repeats JSON file parsing logic excessively across many individual tests instead of using helper functions or parameterized tests.
evidence: packages/remediate-code/tests/schema-contracts.test.ts:62 - Repeated use of JSON.parse(await readFile(...)) for schemas across multiple test assertions.

findings.title: Extensive use of type assertions in wave-scheduler tests
findings.summary: The wave-scheduler tests extensively use `as any` type assertions to mock the environment object, bypassing TypeScript safety and cluttering the tests.
evidence: packages/remediate-code/tests/wave-scheduler.test.ts:13 - The `as any` assertion is used approximately 19 times to pass incomplete process.env mocks.

findings.title: Duplicated test environment setup in postinstall tests
findings.summary: The postinstall tests repeatedly construct the same mock environment object with HOME and USERPROFILE, rather than extracting it to a shared variable or beforeEach hook.
evidence: packages/remediate-code/tests/postinstall.test.ts:28 - `env: { ...process.env, HOME: TEMP_HOME, USERPROFILE: TEMP_HOME }` is repeated 8 times.

findings.title: Duplicated temp directory helper across test files
findings.summary: A custom `withTempDir` helper function is copied verbatim across multiple test files instead of being extracted to a shared test utilities module.
evidence: packages/shared/tests/analyzerDeps.test.mjs:11 - The async function withTempDir(fn) block is identical in 4 separate test files.

findings.title: Inconsistent temp directory management in git.test.mjs
findings.summary: The git.test.mjs file manually manages temporary directories with try/finally blocks, missing out on the `withTempDir` pattern used by other test files in the same module.
evidence: packages/shared/tests/git.test.mjs:18 - Manually implements mkdtemp and cleanup instead of using a helper.
